benefits.description: Dramatic increase in information recall and retention; photographic memory for 10-12 digit sequences (SKUs, serial numbers, reference codes); memories persist and remain easily accessible without intentional effort
Improved sleep cycle through restoration of melatonin secretion and pineal gland signalling

protocol_notes: 30mg course total (2.5mg × 12 days). OP speculates mechanism involves telomerase production, telomere lengthening, chromosome stability, DNA expression improvement, and oxidative stress reduction. Second course planned.
